TestCase z45Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    if (t1.n > 0 && t1.b != NULL) {
        int* follow_case_b = (int*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(int));
        memcpy(follow_case_b, t1.b, t1.n * sizeof(int));
        follow_case.b = follow_case_b;
    }
    // ------------------------------------

    // Defensive code generated based on rule (a) to prevent errors when n < 1
    if (follow_case.n < 1 || follow_case.b == NULL) {
        // Less than 1 element, or b array is NULL, cannot perform operation, return replica directly
        return follow_case;
    }

    // Specific operation code generated based on the rule
    int min_val = follow_case.b[0];
    for (int i = 1; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.b[i] < min_val) {
            min_val = follow_case.b[i];
        }
    }

    // Replace a random element that is greater than min_val with min_val
    // If no element is greater than min_val, no replacement is done
    for (int i = 0; i < follow_case.n; i++) {
        if (follow_case.b[i] > min_val) {
            follow_case.b[i] = min_val;
            break; // Only replace one element
        }
    }

    return follow_case;
}
